## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] New behaviour has tests (if applicable)
- [ ] README updated (if inputs/outputs changed)
